html:
Exclusive to:  

“Wormwood will heal 8 health plus 1 health/sec for 32 seconds.Wormwood will also bloom for 4 minutes.
This also works as good fertilizer for gardening.”

-

The Compost Wrap is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wormwood. It requires 5 Manure, 2 Rot, and 1 Nitre to craft.

The Compost Wrap cannot be used by other character for Health. It is flammable and can be used as Fuel. The Compost Wrap can also be used as a very potent fertilizer for farm plots, restoring 3 arrows of growth formula, 4 arrows of compost, and 3 arrows of manure.

The compost wrap heals 8 health instantly plus an additional 32 health over 32 seconds. It also allows Wormwood to bloom for 4 minutes. This time of effect stacks.

Usage

×2

×5

×25

Trivia

  • The animation for applying the Compost Wrap does not change depending on whether it is used on the player character or another Mob.

Gallery

  • Concept art of Compost Wrap (top left) from Rhymes With Play #241.

Exclusive to:
“Wormwood offered me a bite, but I respectfully declined.”
–Wilson
“That's disgusting!”
–Willow
“Is very mighty poop.”
–Wolfgang
“It's poop. Sigh.”
–Wendy
“THAT FILTHY CREATURE SMEARS IT DIRECTLY ON HIS FACE”
–WX-78
“Oh dear. Those are some large droppings.”
–Wickerbottom
“Well. Plants gotta fertilize.”
–Woodie
“I'm utterly dung with all of this.”
–Maxwell
“I questiön my ally's tastes.”
–Wigfrid
“Double doodoo.”
–Webber
“I'm frankly offended.”
–Warly
“Poop good for heart”
–Wormwood
“Heh. That bean sprout's a gross little guy.”
–Winona
“It's poop. So the plants won't droop.”
–Wortox
“(Sniff) Glurgh!!”
–Wurt
“Oh, uh... that's alright, I'm not hungry.”
–Walter
“To each their own.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Compost Wrap là một Vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật chỉ có thể chế tạo được bởi Wormwood. Nó cần 5 Phân, 2 Thối và 1 Nitre để chế tạo.
